Title: Web Portal (SOA) Implementation
Description: Develop the Patient facing web portal for registration and appointment booking.

Title: Desktop Application (AOA)
Description: Develop the staff terminal for Consultants and Nurses to manage appointments.

Title: Backend Database Integration
Description: Set up Flask API and SQLAlchemy ORM models based on the ERD.

Title: As a Patient, I want to register an account so that I can access the clinic portal.
Description: Create registration form and API endpoint.

Title: As a Patient, I want to book an appointment online so that I don't have to call the clinic.
Description: Implement datetime picker and POST request to backend.

Title: As a Patient, I want to fill out Section One of the medical form before my visit.
Description: Create form for symptoms and allergies linking to my appointment.

Title: As a Nurse, I want to record patient vital signs so the consultant has them ready.
Description: Create desktop GUI inputs for BP and BMI.

Title: As a Consultant, I want to complete Section Two of the medical form with my diagnosis.
Description: Create desktop GUI for diagnosis and clinical notes.

Title: Initialize Flask project and SQLite database
Description: Set up the basic app.py and models.py files.

Title: Design CSS Aesthetic
Description: Implement a modern, premium CSS stylesheet using CVD Clinic brand colors.

Title: Test End-to-End Flow
Description: Run a complete simulation of a patient booking an appointment and a consultant completing it.
